_README_:
Hello! 👋

Thank you for using the Remote First Jobs API!

PLEASE NOTE:
(1) Do not submit jobs from Remote First Jobs to third-party websites like LinkedIn Jobs or Google Jobs.
(2) Include a link to the Remote First Jobs URL and credit Remote First Jobs when using our API.
(3) Non-compliance may lead to access denial.

Jobs are updated every 10 minutes. Max 100 jobs per page, 5 pages.
Jobs are available 24 hours after publication.

Interested in unlimited and private API access? Paid plan is available. Contact us at: hello@remotefirstjobs.com

Best regards,
